use_cases: Toggle between light and dark mode themes
Enable/disable settings in a preferences panel
Switch features on or off in a configuration UI
Control visibility of content or features
Toggle boolean states in forms and settings
ai_summary: A themed toggle switch component featuring sky-themed decorative elements including clouds and stars rendered as inline SVG. Built with styled-components for theming implementation, this toggle provides a visually engaging way to switch between binary states like light/dark mode or enable/disable features. The component wraps a standard checkbox input with custom styling.
